description: Gutter fold operation on a rectangular sheet. Folds the sheet into a U-shaped gutter/channel form.
utility: Fold a rectangular sheet into a U-shaped gutter

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Canvas position for the gutter view

arguments.name: sheet
arguments.description: Reference to the sheet to fold

examples.expression:
sheet_1 = sheetrect(at(4,4), view(14,14), 6, 4, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
gutter_1 = gutter(at(12,40), sheet_1, 3, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))

sheet_1 = sheetrect(at(4,4), view(14,14), 8, 3, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
gutter_1 = gutter(at(4,22), sheet_1)
